mods.name: NaturalVision Evolved
mods.author: Razed
mods.description: A complete visual overhaul for GTA V single-player with cinematic lighting, weather, and color grading.

mods.name: LSPDFR
mods.author: G17 Media
mods.description: Turn Los Santos into your beat. Play as a cop in story mode with callouts, pursuits, and police mechanics.

mods.name: Mercedes-Benz E55 AMG
mods.author: SkylineGTRFreak
mods.description: High-quality add-on vehicle with custom handling, LODs, and template support for Los Santos streets.

mods.name: Iron Man MK85
mods.author: JulioNIB
mods.description: Play as Iron Man in story mode with flight, repulsors, and suit abilities. Single-player only.

mods.name: Railgun Weapon Pack
mods.author: CamoRista
mods.description: Adds a story-mode-safe railgun and energy weapons with custom effects and audio.

mods.name: Liberty City Remaster
mods.author: NT Team
mods.description: Explore a remastered Liberty City map addon designed for offline story-mode exploration.

mods.name: Simple Trainer for SP
mods.author: sjaak327
mods.description: Essential story-mode trainer for spawning vehicles, weapons, weather, and time control offline.

mods.name: QuantV Remix
mods.author: QuantV
mods.description: Premium reshade-style visual enhancement tuned for performance with deep night and rain ambience.

mods.name: Lamborghini Huracán
mods.author: Ying Yeung
mods.description: Stunning Huracán add-on with breakable glass, working dials, and custom engine audio.

mods.name: Story Mode Save Tool
mods.author: Community Pack
mods.description: Lightweight save backup utility mod for story-mode profiles. Bundled for launcher one-click install.
